mapper.sql: id, task_id AS taskId, status, src_file_path AS srcFilePath, src_device_key AS srcDeviceKey, dest_file_relative_path AS destFileRelativePath, dest_pool_name AS destPoolName, dest_fmt AS destFmt, change_id AS changeId,dest_file_size as destFileSize,src_device_remaining_capacity as srcDeviceRemainingCapacity, src_device_migrated_capacity as srcDeviceMigratedCapacity
mapper.insert:
insert into TBL_VM_MIGRATE_STORAGE (task_id ,status, src_file_path, src_device_key, dest_file_full_path, dest_pool_name , dest_fmt, change_id,dest_file_size,src_device_remaining_capacity) values
(#{item.taskId},#{item.status},#{item.srcFilePath},#{item.srcDeviceKey}, #{item.destFileFullPath}, #{item.destPoolName}, #{item.destFmt}, #{item.changeId} , #{item.destFileSize}, #{item.srcDeviceRemainingCapacity})
